query:
SELECT username, attribute, op, value
FROM radreply
WHERE username IN (SELECT username FROM subscribers WHERE createdBy = 17 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)
AND attribute = 'Mikrotik-Rate-Limit';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT username, attribute, op, value
FROM radreply
WHERE username IN (SELECT username FROM subscribers WHERE createdBy = 17 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1)
AND attribute = 'Mikrotik-Rate-Limit';
